← the Atlas

Bugs

index· evergreen ·JUN 19, 2026

Diagnosed defects and their fix direction — what's broken, the root cause, and the shape of the repair.

The Bugs index gathers notes that diagnose a real defect and point at its fix. A bug note names the broken behavior, the root cause once it’s understood, and the direction of the repair — the reasoning, not a tracker ticket.

This note is an index (moc: true): a note is filed here by listing bug in its parents. The graph renders it large; the notes wired to it are its cluster, and its card on the Atlas lists them all.

Referenced by

  • Code-tab filter strands empty directories
  • Graph view + Maps of Content
  • Markdown preview: repo-relative links open the target file
  • Phantom running_background — Claude shows "running" forever
← the Atlas github ↗
